conservative.name: Sneaky Git
conservative.requirements: Melee weapon, engaged with target and at least 1 ally

success.description: You creep up behind the target and stick 'im in his gizzard and hit for normal damage
You hit the target for +1 damage per Cunning dice you have access to

boon.description: Ignore the target's armour soak value for this attack

chaosStar.description: The target may immediately remove 1 recharge token from one of his currently recharging cards

sigmarsComet.description: You inflict extra damage equal to your Agility rating

reckless.name: Warpath
reckless.requirements: Melee weapon equipped, you must have just entered the target's engagement this round

success.description: You hit the target for +2 damage, and inflict 1 wound on all characters in the engagement (except you)

As above, plus you may suffer 1 fatigue to engage another target in another engagement within close range of you that you have not yet engaged this turn. Repeat the Warpath attack and add to the dice pool. If you trigger this result again, you will add further to the pool

chaosStar.description: All green skins in the engagement (including you) suffer 1 wound

sigmarsComet.description: All enemy characters engaged with the target suffer 1 wound
